title: thysselinum lucidum
intro: Thysselinum lucidum, also known as glossy hawthorn, is a plant species belonging to the carrot family (Apiaceae). It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Thysselinum lucidum include reducing blood pressure, improving cardiovascular health, and acting as an antioxidant. The herbal preparations of Thysselinum lucidum include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to support overall well-being and promote healthy heart function.
